title: 3 Magic Formula AI Stocks to Watch
text: In his 2005 bestseller “The Little Book That Beats the Market,” Joel Greenblatt (Trades, Portfolio) introduced the investing world to the Magic Formula, a simple mathematical formula to find profitable businesses that trade at bargain prices.

title: The 7 Most Undervalued Stocks to Buy in March 2023
text: The equities market continues to be incredibly volatile. Investors were optimistic following a robust rally in Jan.; all major U.S. indices are down since then.
